underlying_goal: Fix a widget content bleed bug where updating one widget overwrites all widgets' content, validate the fix on an emulator, and document widget creation steps
friction_detail: Two 500 API errors interrupted the second validation run, requiring the user to ask Claude to retry.
brief_summary: User needed a widget content bleed bug fixed, validated interactively on an emulator twice with different scenarios, documented widget creation steps, and committed — all achieved successfully.
